_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in A2/003 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Mia; computer plays Leo. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 003 · My Future Job

npc.text: What do you want to be?

learning_objective: Say what you want to be

routes.meaning: Mia says she wants to be a doctor.
examples: I want to be a doctor.
I want to be a doctor when I grow up.
I'd like to be a doctor.
A doctor. I want to be a doctor.
routes.hint: Say your dream job: “I want to be a doctor.”

examples: I want to be a teacher.
I want to be a vet.
I want to be a scientist.
I want to be a pilot too!
routes.hint: You can name any job, or say “I want to be a doctor.”

partial.message: Tell Leo your dream job: “I want to be a doctor.”

off_topic.message: Leo asked what you want to be. Try “I want to be a doctor.”

npc.text: Why do you want to be a doctor?

routes.meaning: Mia says because she wants to help sick people.
examples: Because I want to help sick people.
Because I want to help sick people get better.
Because I like helping sick people.
Because I want to help people who are sick.
routes.hint: Give your reason: “Because I want to help sick people.”

routes.meaning: Mia says because she likes helping people.
examples: Because I like to help people.
Because helping people makes me happy.
Because I care about sick people.
Because I want to make people healthy.
routes.hint: You can say “Because I want to help sick people.”

partial.message: Tell Leo why: “Because I want to help sick people.”

off_topic.message: Leo asked why. Try “Because I want to help sick people.”

npc.text: That sounds interesting! Why do you want that job?

routes.meaning: Mia gives a reason for her job using because.
examples: Because I want to help people.
Because I love it.
Because it is a great job.
Because I want to help sick people.
routes.hint: Start with because: “Because I want to help people.”

partial.message: Give a reason: “Because I want to help people.”

off_topic.message: Leo asked why. Try “Because I want to help people.”

routes.meaning: Mia asks Leo what he wants to be.
examples: What about you, Leo?
What about you?
And what about you, Leo?
Thank you! What about you, Leo?
routes.hint: Ask Leo back: “What about you, Leo?”

routes.meaning: Mia thanks him and asks him back.
examples: Thank you! And what about you?
Thanks! What do you want to be?
Thank you, Leo! What about you?
That's kind! What about you?
routes.hint: You can say “What about you, Leo?”

partial.message: Ask Leo back: “What about you, Leo?”

off_topic.message: Now ask Leo. Try “What about you, Leo?”

npc.text: I want to be a pilot.

routes.meaning: Mia reacts and asks why a pilot.
examples: Wow! Why a pilot?
Wow! Why do you want to be a pilot?
Cool! Why a pilot?
Really? Why a pilot?
routes.hint: React and ask: “Wow! Why a pilot?”

routes.meaning: Mia says it's cool and asks why he likes it.
examples: That's so cool! Why do you like it?
Awesome! Why a pilot?
Nice! Why do you want that?
A pilot? Why do you like it?
routes.hint: You can say “Wow! Why a pilot?”

partial.message: Ask Leo why: “Wow! Why a pilot?”

off_topic.message: Leo wants to be a pilot. Try “Wow! Why a pilot?”

npc.text: Because I love airplanes and the sky.

routes.meaning: Mia says they should study hard for their dreams.
examples: We should study hard for our dreams.
We should study hard to reach our dreams.
Then we should study hard for our dreams.
We should both study hard for our dreams.
routes.hint: End with a plan: “We should study hard for our dreams.”

routes.meaning: Mia encourages Leo to follow his dream.
examples: I hope your dream comes true!
That's a great dream, Leo!
You will be a great pilot!
I love the sky too! Good luck.
routes.hint: You can say “We should study hard for our dreams.”

partial.message: End with a plan: “We should study hard for our dreams.”

off_topic.message: Time to finish. Try “We should study hard for our dreams.”

npc.text: Yes! Let's study hard and follow our dreams. Good luck, Mia!
